description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image, define LANG and NOKOGIRI_USE_SYSTEM_LIBRARIES variables, and set a cache with key jekyll that stores the vendor directory. In the test stage add a test job that runs the before_script commands ruby -v and bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --path vendor, then executes jekyll build and htmlproof ./_site --only-4xx, and runs on all branches except gh-pages. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also runs the before_script, then runs jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the gh-pages branch.
